input.user_input: Update the limitation of liability cap in the vendor agreement from $500,000 to $1,000,000.

actual: Please provide or upload the vendor agreement you would like me to update. Once you share the document, I can locate the limitation of liability clause and increase the cap from $500,000 to $1,000,000 for you.
